<?xml version="1.0"?>
<moleculizer-state>
  <model>
    <units-states>
      <modifications/>
      <mols/>
    </units-states>
    <explicit-species-tags>
      <explicit-species-tag name="active-kin1" tag="0x805812c"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="active-kin2" tag="0x80583bc"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="active-kin3" tag="0x80581dc"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="active-receptor" tag="0x80580dc"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="inactive-kin1" tag="0x8058394"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="inactive-kin2" tag="0x80581b4"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="inactive-kin3" tag="0x8058204"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="inactive-receptor" tag="0x8058104"/>
      <explicit-species-tag name="ptase-x" tag="0x805822c"/>
    </explicit-species-tags>
    <tagged-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x805812c">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="0"/>
        <concentration value="0"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x80583bc">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="0"/>
        <concentration value="0"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x80581dc">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="1"/>
        <concentration value="1.66113e-12"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x80580dc">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="0"/>
        <concentration value="0"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x8058394">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="1000"/>
        <concentration value="1.66113e-09"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x80581b4">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="1000"/>
        <concentration value="1.66113e-09"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x8058204">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="999"/>
        <concentration value="1.65947e-09"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x8058104">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="1000"/>
        <concentration value="1.66113e-09"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
      <tagged-stoch-species tag="0x805822c">
        <weight daltons="50000"/>
        <population count="1000"/>
        <concentration value="1.66113e-09"/>
      </tagged-stoch-species>
    </tagged-species>
    <tag-reactions>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x80580dc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x8058104" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="8"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x80580dc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x8058394" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x80580dc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x805812c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+10"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x805812c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x805822c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x805822c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x8058394" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+10"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x805812c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x80581b4" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x805812c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x80583bc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+10"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x805822c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x80583bc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x80581b4" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x805822c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+10"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x8058204" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x80583bc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x80581dc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x80583bc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+10"/>
      </tag-reaction>
      <tag-reaction>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x80581dc" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-substrate tag="0x805822c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x8058204" multiplicity="1"/>
        <tagged-product tag="0x805822c" multiplicity="1"/>
        <rate value="1e+10"/>
      </tag-reaction>
    </tag-reactions>
    <volume liters="1e-12"/>
    <time seconds="0.99"/>
  </model>
  <streams>
    <tagged-species-streams>
      <tagged-species-stream name="active-kin1">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x805812c"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="active-kin2">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x80583bc"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="active-kin3">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x80581dc"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="active-receptor">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x80580dc"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="inactive-kin1">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8058394"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="inactive-kin2">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x80581b4"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="inactive-kin3">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8058204"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="inactive-receptor">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x8058104"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
      <tagged-species-stream name="ptase-x">
        <tagged-species-ref tag="0x805822c"/>
      </tagged-species-stream>
    </tagged-species-streams>
    <tagged-dump-streams>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="active-kinases.dmp" dump-period="0.01">
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="active-kin1"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="active-kin2"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="active-kin3"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="others.dmp" dump-period="0.01">
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="active-receptor"/>
        <tagged-species-stream-ref name="ptase-x"/>
      </tagged-dump-stream>
      <tagged-dump-stream file-name="stats" dump-period="0.01"/>
    </tagged-dump-streams>
  </streams>
</moleculizer-state>
